feature: MillenniumIT Gap Closure Sprint 2 — Partial → Covered
requirement: Off-book confirmation, node hierarchy, CSV bulk import, WebSocket market data, CSD balance validation, mass amend

tasks.title: Off-book confirmation + node hierarchy + CSV import + mass amend
tasks.description:
Address 4 partial items in one task.

Part A — Off-book trade confirmation workflow:
Modify src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_off_book.go:
- Add status workflow: REPORTED → CONFIRMED / REJECTED
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/off-book/{id}/confirm — counterparty confirms the trade
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/off-book/{id}/reject — counterparty rejects with reason
- Only the counterparty firm (seller if reporter is buyer) can confirm/reject
- Add ConfirmedBy, RejectedBy, RejectionReason fields to OffBookTrade type

Part B — Node hierarchy with privilege inheritance:
Add to types.go:
- Node struct: ID, FirmID, ParentNodeID, Name, Permissions []string, CreatedAt — json tags
Add to store.go:
- NodeStore: Create, Get, List(firmID), ListChildren(parentID), GetEffectivePermissions(nodeID) (walk up tree, merge permissions) + InMemory
Create handlers_node.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/nodes — create node under firm (validate: firm_id, name)
- GET /api/v1/securities/nodes?firm_id= — list nodes for firm
- GET /api/v1/securities/nodes/{id}/permissions — get effective (inherited) permissions
- PUT /api/v1/securities/nodes/{id}/permissions — set node-level permissions

Part C — CSV bulk import:
Modify src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_bulk.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/bulk/instruments/csv — accept text/csv body
- Parse CSV header row, map columns to instrument fields
- Validate each row, create instruments for valid rows
- Return BulkUploadResult with per-row errors

Part D — Mass amend (bulk update):
Add to handlers_bulk.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/bulk/instruments/amend — accept JSON array of {id, fields_to_update}
- For each item: find instrument, apply partial update
- Return {amended_count, failed_count, errors[]}

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: WebSocket market data push + CSD balance validation + instrument-level permissions
tasks.description:
Address 3 more partial items.

Part A — WebSocket market data push:
Create src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_ws.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/ws/market-data — WebSocket endpoint
- On connect: client sends {subscribe: instrument_id}
- Server pushes OrderBookSnapshot + TickerData on every trade for subscribed instruments
- Use gorilla-free approach: golang.org/x/net/websocket or net/http upgrade
- For MVP: use Server-Sent Events (SSE) instead of WebSocket (simpler, no external deps)
  - GET /api/v1/securities/sse/market-data?instrument_id=APU — SSE stream
  - After each trade, push event: {type: 'trade', data: {price, qty, instrument_id}}
  - After each order book change, push: {type: 'book', data: {bids, asks}}
- Store SSE connections in a concurrent map, broadcast on trade events

Part B — CSD balance validation on transfers:
Modify src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_csd.go handleCreateTransfer:
- Before creating a DvP/FoP transfer, validate:
  1. From-account has sufficient available balance (AvailableQty >= transfer.Quantity)
  2. To-account exists
  3. For DvP: validate payment amount matches (if applicable)
- On complete: deduct from source balance, credit to destination balance
- On fail: no balance changes

Part C — Instrument-level permissions per group:
Modify handlers_instrument_group.go:
- Add Permissions []string field to InstrumentGroup type
- PUT /api/v1/securities/instrument-groups/{id}/permissions — set permissions for the group
- When checking order submission: if instrument belongs to a group with restricted permissions, verify participant has matching permission

Update server.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for Sprint 2
tasks.description:
Write tests for all Sprint 2 features.

1. Off-book confirmation:
- TestConfirmOffBookTrade → 200, status CONFIRMED
- TestRejectOffBookTrade → 200, status REJECTED

2. Node hierarchy:
- TestNodeStore_Create_List
- TestNodeStore_EffectivePermissions — child inherits parent permissions
- TestCreateNode → 201
- TestGetNodePermissions — inherited permissions returned

3. CSV import:
- TestCSVImport_Valid — 3 rows → 3 instruments
- TestCSVImport_PartialFail — invalid row → error in result

4. Mass amend:
- TestMassAmend_Success — 2 instruments updated
- TestMassAmend_NotFound — unknown id → error

5. CSD balance validation:
- TestCSDTransfer_InsufficientBalance → 422
- TestCSDTransfer_ValidBalance → 201, balances updated

6. SSE market data:
- TestSSEEndpoint_Returns200 — GET /sse/market-data returns 200 with text/event-stream content type

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
